name: auto_import
title: Auto-Import Tutorial
description: Learn how to use automatic file monitoring and import features

steps.text:
🚀 Auto-Import Feature

Auto-Import allows PDF Utility to monitor a directory and automatically import new PDF files. Configure this feature through Tools → Settings.

📂 Target Widget Selection

Auto-imported files can be sent to any of these widgets automatically. Choose your preferred destination in the settings.

📊 Auto-Import Status

When auto-import is active, the status bar shows monitoring information and import notifications.
